metadata.description:
An entire scrape of the GOG Games Archive, with intent to make the links easier to preserve

For an entire scrape of the now defunct GOG Games public API (that includes .md5 files!), see archive.org/details/gog-games-api
metadata.subject: gog-games.to
gog.squid.wtf
GOG games
metadata.title: gog.squid.wtf scrape
